headline: Netflix: WBD Termination, Buyback, Ad-Tech, Live-Event Edge, And Legacy Regression
summary: Hold/avoid Netflix (NFLX): $25B buyback, ad-tech margin gains and genAI efficiencies vs IP embargo risk, sports margin dilution and moat erosion. Click to read.

headline: Paramount Skydance (PSKY) Nears EU Approval For Warner Bros. Discovery Deal
summary: Paramount Skydance is approaching a key regulatory hurdle as the European Union reviews its proposed acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery. EU approval may depend on Paramount Skydance exiting its film distribution joint venture with Universal Pictures. The potential sign off would follow approval in the U.S. and could shape how future large media mergers are reviewed. Paramount Skydance, traded as NasdaqGS:PSKY, is moving through a pivotal phase with its proposed takeover of Warner Bros...
